use_cases: Displaying rotating user testimonials with star ratings on landing pages
Building social proof with auto-rotating review carousels
Showcasing community feedback with animated entrance effects on scroll
ai_summary: An animated testimonial carousel component featuring auto-rotation, scroll-triggered entrance animations using Framer Motion, and star ratings. Displays user reviews with avatars, roles, and company information in a clean, minimal flat design. Supports custom intervals for rotation and includes optional trusted companies section.
